'''Reinforced fiber armor''' was a type of light [[Armor/Legends|armor]] that was crafted by armorers on [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] where metals were in short supply. Its makeup consisted of the fibers of the [[jung-ju]] [[Tree/Legends|tree]] bound together with synthetic materials, thus offering good, flexible protection. Fiber armor was especially designed to channel energy-weapon attacks away from the body. The fibers woven into its exterior caused it to absorb and harmlessly disperse energy damage. However, fiber armor was far from perfect; and lucky shots managed to pass through.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
